objective: Cycle 94 — C124: mg_volonte display formula + lair stone tile square proportions

bugs_fixed: C124/VOL-FORMULA-01 (MEDIUM): mg_volonte live 'Focus:%' display used timeOnTarget/elapsedTime — showed 100% at game start (division by near-zero) and diverged from the score formula (timeOnTarget/totalTime * 100). Same pattern as SF-HUD-01 (C121/mg_sang_froid). Fix: use totalTime as denominator in both display and score. Affects every Volonte minigame play.

C124/LAIR-TILE-01 (LOW→visual quality): InstancedMesh stone wall tiles had ROW_H = 16/3 ≈ 5.33u — tiles 4u wide but 5.33u tall, visible Y-elongation on all 3 lair walls. Fix: ROW_H = 16/4 = 4.0u (square 4×4 tiles). Rows 3→4, instances 48→64. Still 3 draw calls (InstancedMesh). Proportions géométriques score: 7.5→8.5.
audit_summary.c124_verdict: CLEAR — Volonte formula aligned, wall tiles square. 0 TS errors.
c124_confirmations: LairGLBAssets.ts: ROW_H = 16/4 = 4.0u, ROWS = 4. Back wall 24 tiles, left/right 20 each. Total 64.
Build: main=51.99KB gzip (+0.01KB), minigames=25.42KB gzip. 0 TS errors.
